records.question: Which user profiles have the name Natalie Portman, email np@superstar.com, at least 94375428 followers, and a partition ID of at most 5?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT user_profiles.uid FROM user_profiles
WHERE user_profiles.partitionid <= 5 AND user_profiles.email = 'np@superstar.com' AND user_profiles.followers >= 94375428 AND user_profiles.name = 'Natalie Portman'
records.pred_sql: SELECT uid FROM user_profiles WHERE name = 'Natalie Portman' AND email = 'np@superstar.com' AND followers >= 94375428 AND partitionid <= 5

records.question: Which user profiles are for Celine Dion with exactly 23,927,492 followers and email cd@superstar.com, have a partition ID at least 5, and posted the tweet "Let's celebrate women, fight for equality and support each other,  not just today, but everyday!" on or before 2018-03-12 02:30:30?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT user_profiles.uid FROM user_profiles
JOIN tweets ON user_profiles.uid = tweets.uid
WHERE user_profiles.email = 'cd@superstar.com' AND user_profiles.followers = 23927492 AND user_profiles.name = 'Celine Dion' AND user_profiles.partitionid >= 5 AND tweets.createdate <= '2018-03-12 02:30:30' AND tweets.text = 'Let’s celebrate women, fight for equality and support each other,  not just today, but everyday!'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT up.uid
FROM user_profiles up
JOIN tweets t ON up.uid = t.uid
WHERE up.name = 'Celine Dion'
  AND up.followers = 23927492
  AND up.email = 'cd@superstar.com'
  AND up.partitionid >= 5
  AND t.text = "Let's celebrate women, fight for equality and support each other,  not just today, but everyday!"
  AND t.createdate <= '2018-03-12 02:30:30'

records.question: Who named Celine Dion with exactly 23927492 followers, email cd@superstar.com, in partition 5, tweeted "I had a pretty rough time during the last couple of weeks" on or before 2018-03-12 02:30:30?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT user_profiles.uid FROM user_profiles
JOIN tweets ON user_profiles.uid = tweets.uid
WHERE tweets.createdate <= '2018-03-12 02:30:30' AND user_profiles.partitionid = 5 AND user_profiles.followers = 23927492 AND user_profiles.email = 'cd@superstar.com' AND tweets.text = 'I had a pretty rough time during the last couple of weeks' AND user_profiles.name = 'Celine Dion'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT u.uid
FROM user_profiles u
JOIN tweets t ON u.uid = t.uid
WHERE u.name = 'Celine Dion'
  AND u.followers = 23927492
  AND u.email = 'cd@superstar.com'
  AND u.partitionid = 5
  AND t.text = 'I had a pretty rough time during the last couple of weeks'
  AND t.createdate <= '2018-03-12 02:30:30'

records.question: Which user profiles have a partition ID of at least 23?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT user_profiles.uid FROM user_profiles
WHERE user_profiles.partitionid >= 23
records.pred_sql: SELECT uid FROM user_profiles WHERE partitionid >= 23
